steps.t: Nauriel stands by a posted notice outside Mâr Naphra.
Nauriel stands outside Mâr Naphra, considering the bounty posted on the Kindred of the Coins by the Heirs of Castamir.
A man called Galadaith has called for you from atop a tall building on the western side of Mâr Naphra.
Nauriel waits for you outside Mâr Naphra.
